strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with core stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes
Hands-on AI agent development at current role, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare, explicitly required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, authored test libraries, and taught testing courses/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned, the primary backend framework for this role
Testing framework overlap is indirect — deep TDD background but no explicit Jest, Vitest, or Playwright usage cited
Kotlin and Python absent from skills list (Java present but dated to 2016-2018 robotics work)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and named testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright)

response.justification: The role requires 6+ years of fullstack work in TypeScript/Node/React; the candidate far exceeds this with production TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB at Optilyz and RIDE, AWS CDK cloud work, and Kubernetes deployment for GISCollective. The required AI agent development competency is directly evidenced by current MCP code-generator and agentic-framework work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is demonstrated through TDD practice, a self-authored assertion library, and Selenium instruction, though the specific frameworks named in the JD (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not cited. Databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Git, and Docker are all confirmed. Gaps are narrow: no Nest.js evidence, and multi-language coverage lists Java but not Kotlin or Python. Communication and collaboration are supported by extensive workshops, talks, and mentoring. Evidence across nearly all core competencies is strong, with only framework-specific gaps that are readily learnable.
